case_title: YIFEI CHANG VS. NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,318.98 FILED BY CHANG, YIFEI AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING COMPANY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, YIFEI AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED. AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE SERVED DEC-07-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF YIFEI CHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506) *CHRISTOPHER SERRANO, PROPERTY ADJUSTER FOR NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY APPEARED IN COURT AT 9:10 A.M. AFTER THE MATTER WAS HEARD AND JUDGMENT WAS ISSUED. MR. SERRANO IS INFORMED THAT THE MATTER HAS BEEN RULED ON AND THAT DEFENDANT, NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, WOULD RECEIVE NOTICE OF JUDGMENT IN THE MAIL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, YIFEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY $5,318.90 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,408.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
